caption: The video begins with a black screen, which then transitions to display a bright orange circle centered on the screen. Inside the circle, there is a white letter "S". The background remains consistently black throughout this sequence, creating a stark contrast that highlights the orange circle and the white letter. In the bottom left corner of the screen, the name "Susan Nirmal" appears in white text, suggesting that this might be an introduction or title card for a segment or presentation by Susan Nirmal. The overall visual is simple yet striking, drawing immediate attention to the central elements.
